ThanksOnThirdEditThreshold.description: Edit number that triggers the Thanks message (default: the user's 3rd edit). Counted globally across all language wikis, since the user table is shared.

ThanksOnThirdEditTargetWiki.description: Wiki ID (database name) whose talk page the message is posted to, and whose job queue the post is enqueued on. Defaults to the shared English wiki.

ThanksOnThirdEditFlagOption.description: User option set to 1 once a user has been thanked, to guarantee the message is posted only once. Stored in the shared user_properties table, so it is global across all wikis.

ThanksOnThirdEditSystemUser.description: Name of the system account credited with posting the Thanks message in page history.

ThanksOnThirdEditHeading.description: Section heading for the Thanks message.

ThanksOnThirdEditBody.value: Hey, thanks for your edits here, we like your work! Let me know if we can help with anything.
ThanksOnThirdEditBody.description: Body text of the Thanks message, placed before the signatures.

ThanksOnThirdEditSigners.description: Usernames whose signatures are appended to the message.
